Home.title: Handcrafted footwear and premium repair atelier
Home.description: KHATT Shoes offers custom footwear, shoe sales and professional restoration services with a premium atelier experience.
Home.servicesTitle: A complete atelier experience from creation to restoration
Home.servicesDescription: At KHATT Shoes, every detail is shaped around material quality, form, comfort and durability.
Home.serviceShopDescription: Ready-to-wear models and limited collections made from selected materials.
Home.serviceCustomDescription: Custom shoes crafted according to your measurements, style and chosen materials.
Home.serviceRepairDescription: Sole replacement, stitching, color restoration, polishing and full professional restoration.
Home.featuredDescription: Selected KHATT Shoes models for different styles, occasions and daily use.
Home.craftTitle: Every pair requires detail, patience and expert workmanship
Home.craftDescription: Our approach is not only to make shoes. The goal is to create footwear that fits well, lasts long and has character.
Home.repairTitle: A premium look for worn shoes
Home.repairDescription: We extend the life of footwear through cleaning, color restoration, leather care and sole work.
Home.customCtaDescription: Share your material, color, shape and size preferences. We will prepare a tailored atelier offer for you.
Home.testimonialsTitle: Premium look, comfortable wear and professional service
Home.contactCtaTitle: Contact us for orders and consultation
Home.contactCtaDescription: Speak with KHATT Shoes about shoe selection, bespoke footwear and the repair process.
